title: Daily Report June 24, 2026 - GoThru Dashboard API

issues.display_title: Issue #1432: API Delete All Stitching Images
issues.main_description_html:
Allow users to delete multiple stitching images in one request instead of removing them one by one.

Endpoint: DELETE /stitching/images

Example request:

{
  "moderation_id": 3561007,
  "file_names": ["Stitch (5).jpg", "Stitch (6).jpg", "Stitch (7).jpg"]
}

Expected result:

  • users can remove several stitching images at once
  • the request is tied to a single moderation_id
  • if one or more requested files do not exist, the request should return an error instead of partially deleting the list

Note from Developer

  • Added the new bulk delete API endpoint: DELETE /stitching/images
  • Added request validation and batch delete behavior for multiple stitching image names in one request
  • Added tests for success, validation, and missing-file error handling
  • Added API documentation and registered this endpoint in the ADR migrated API list
  • API doc: https://github.com/GoThruMedia/GoThru-API-New/blob/feat/create-bulk-delete-stitch-images/docs/v2/stitching/delete-images.md

Related PR: #1433

Migrate this endpoint to the Domain-Based ADR architecture.

issues.display_title: Issue #1425: docs: add Compliance Status & Remarks to all v2 API docs + compact ADR_MIGRATED_APIS
issues.main_description_html:
What was done

  • Added Compliance Status and Remarks sections to all 63 files under docs/v2/
  • Content sourced from ADR_MIGRATED_APIS.md per-entry data
  • Compacted docs/ADR_MIGRATED_APIS.md from 875 lines → 73-line reference table; full details now live in individual doc files

Files affected

  • docs/ADR_MIGRATED_APIS.md — rewritten as quick-reference table (63 rows)
  • All 63 docs/v2/**/*.md files — each now ends with **Compliance Status:** and **Remarks:** sections

Endpoint: POST /tours/set-wizard/{mid}
Current code: Tours\ToursController@setWizardTours
Why it's simple: validation + 1 update

Category A ? thin logic currently written inline in a large controller. Extract into Controller ? Action ? Repository with a DTO and exception mapping.

Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md

Note from Developer

Migrated to Domain-Based ADR. PR #1436 — branch feat/adr-tours-set-wizard.

Endpoint: POST /tours/set-wizard/{mid} (auth)

Summary of changes:

  • New SetWizardController → SetWizardAction → ToursRepository::updateWizardMode + SetWizardDto.
  • Mode validation (novice/advance) + ownership in the Action; novice→0 / advance→1 mapping.
  • Response: { messages, wizard }, 200.
  • Bug fix: added missing translation key messages.tours.success_set_wizard (legacy returned the raw key string).
  • SetWizardActionTest (4 cases). Legacy setWizardTours removed from ToursController.

API doc: docs/v2/tours/set-wizard.md

Endpoint: POST /tours/rename (auth)

Summary of changes:

  • New RenameTourController → RenameTourAction → ToursRepository::updateBusinessName + RenameTourDto.

  • Response: { messages }, 200.
  • RenameTourActionTest (4 cases). Legacy renameTour removed from ToursController.

API doc: docs/v2/tours/rename-tour.md

Endpoint: PUT /viewer360/versions/{code}
Current code: Viewer360\Viewer360Controller@updateVersion
Why it's simple: validate + update (currently no auth ? add auth on migration)

Category A ? thin logic currently written inline in a large controller. Extract into Controller ? Action ? Repository with a DTO and exception mapping.

Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md

Note from Developer

Migrated to Domain-Based ADR. PR #1434 — branch feat/adr-viewer360-update-version.

Endpoint: PUT /viewer360/versions/{code} (auth)

Summary of changes:

  • New UpdateVersionController → UpdateVersionAction → VersionRepository::updateByCode + UpdateVersionDto.
  • Security fix: route moved into the auth middleware group (legacy had no auth).
  • name-required validation → Viewer360ValidationException; unknown code → VersionNotFoundException (404) via existsByCode guard (replaces legacy no-op 409).
  • UpdateVersionActionTest (4 cases). Legacy updateVersion removed from Viewer360Controller.

API doc: docs/v2/viewer360/update-version.md

Endpoint: POST /viewer360/versions (auth)

Summary of changes:

  • New AddVersionController → AddVersionAction → VersionRepository::insertVersion + AddVersionDto.
  • name-required + code-numeric validation → Viewer360ValidationException.
  • Route in auth middleware group (replaces the legacy manual checkToken); preserves legacy 201 Created.

API doc: docs/v2/viewer360/add-version.md
